sense.definition: the entire collection of works (such as music recordings, films, books, or other creative output) that an artist or creator has produced throughout their career
generally accepted rules or principles, especially those that are considered as fundamental in a field of art or philosophy

examples.x: In literature, Shakespeare's plays are often considered part of the canon, representing some of the most significant works in English literature.
The principles of classical music theory form the canon that composers often adhere to when creating new pieces.
The scientific method is a fundamental part of the canon of modern science, providing a framework for conducting experiments and analyzing data.
The Impressionist painters challenged the traditional canon of art by experimenting with color, light, and brushwork in their works.
In philosophy, the writings of Plato and Aristotle are foundational to the canon of Western thought, influencing generations of thinkers and scholars.

sense.definition: creative forms of art such as painting, sculpture, music, and dance, valued for their beauty and expression rather than practical use

examples.x: She studied fine arts at a prestigious university.
Painting is one of the most popular fine arts.
He developed a deep appreciation for fine arts during his travels.
Fine arts include both traditional and modern art forms.
Many students pursue fine arts as a way to express their creativity.

sense.definition: the part of a scene, photograph, etc. that is closest to the observer

examples.x: He placed an old truck tire in the foreground to add visual interest and texture against the snow-covered field behind it.
The out-of-focus trees in the foreground serve to softly separate the midground from the photogenic mountains framing the valley.
The photographer used a shallow depth of field to draw attention to the flowers in the foreground and blur the background.
The photographer adjusted the focus to capture the details in the foreground of the landscape.
In the painting, the artist skillfully blended colors to emphasize the figures in the foreground.

sense.definition: the size and shape of a physical artwork, such as a painting, sculpture, or photograph
a show of respect or admiration for someone or something, often expressed through a creative work such as a painting, poem, or song

examples.x: The artist paid homage to Picasso by including some of his signature styles in the new painting.
She wrote a short story as a homage to her favorite childhood book.
The election victory was seen as a homage to his late father's long political career.

sense.definition: a representation of something, such as a person, object, or scene, created with a medium such as a photograph, painting, or drawing

examples.x: She captured a stunning image of a mountain peak with her camera.
The documentary included images of various endangered species in the wild.
The magazine featured an image of a famous celebrity on its cover.
The photographer exhibited a series of black and white images at the gallery.
The website used vibrant images to showcase its products.

sense.definition: a great piece of art or literature that is considered to be the best or an excellent example of an artist's or author's work
a person who is employed by an artist to pose for a painting, photograph, etc.

examples.x: The artist hired a model to sit for a portrait, capturing the subject's unique features and expressions.
She enjoyed working as a model, finding it fascinating to see how different photographers interpret her appearance.
The painting was inspired by a live model, allowing the artist to study the human form in great detail.
During the fashion class, students learned how to direct a model to achieve the desired poses for their photo shoots.
The sculptor used a model to create a realistic representation of the human figure, ensuring accuracy in proportions and details.

sense.definition: a drawing or painting, etc. of someone or something

examples.x: She drew a picture of a sunset over the mountains for her art class.
She presented me a picture of my favorite flowers she painted herself.
The art gallery showcases pictures by local artists, from landscapes to abstracts.
The picture in the book vividly depicts life in medieval times.
The picture on the restaurant wall shows a stunning view of the city.

sense.definition: a particular posture assumed by someone in order to be artistically recreated
a person or object that is the focus of a work of art, such as a painting or photograph
the way an artist handles or deals with a subject or theme in a work of art
a painting, piece of music or book that is produced by a painter, musician, or writer

examples.x: Each work in the artist's collection tells a unique story.
Her latest work, a gripping thriller novel, is a best-seller.
The gallery displayed an early work of the artist, showcasing her evolution over the years.

sense.definition: the part of a photograph, etc. that is situated behind the main figures, etc.

examples.x: The photographer adjusted the lighting to highlight the background behind the main subject.
She chose a plain background for her passport photo to ensure clarity.
The artist painted a detailed background to complement the central figures in the portrait.
The background of the historical painting depicted a bustling city street in the 19th century.
The designer used a gradient background to enhance the overall aesthetic of the website.

sense.definition: a single movement of a pen or pencil, or paintbrush

examples.x: Her bedroom wall features a painting of her favorite cityscape.
In her painting, you can see a blend of modern and traditional techniques.
She gifted me a beautiful painting of a serene beach at sunset.
The painting of the countryside evokes feelings of serenity and peace
This painting captures the beauty of the night sky filled with stars.

sense.definition: the activity or art of creating illustrations by a pen or pencil

examples.x: She improved her drawing skills through practice.
Drawing helps her relax after a long day.
The child’s drawing covered the entire paper.
He took a course to improve his drawing skills.
